## X-Sense Home Security v.1.2.6.28

### 🔧 Prerelease camera test
- Starts the camera live-view keepalive immediately when Home Assistant opens a WebRTC session, matching the Android app live-view startup more closely.
- Updates the manifest version so HACS/Home Assistant reports the installed prerelease correctly.
- Adds a release metadata check so future prereleases cannot ship with a stale manifest version.
